results.title: Search Tour
results.agentOutput:
The automated test 'Search Tour' was completed successfully. The tour was added to the cart, and checkout was possible, as described in the `task_completed` message from the navigator.

However, there was an error when trying to record an assertion with ID 11. The validator reported: "Assertion with ID 11 not found." This indicates an issue with the assertion recording system rather than the test execution itself.
